devnotes.summary: procedure FileHistory Creates a list of history files of a specified source file. Each version of the file get's an extention .~~ The file with the lowest number is the youngest file.
devnotes.param: (string) Folder where the history files should be created. If no folder is defined the folder of the source file is used.

(TDateTime) Timestamp how old the file has to be to create a new history version. For example: NOW-1/24 => Only once per hour a new history file is created. Default 0 means allways (boolean) Flag to define that the history file extention should replace the current extention or should be added at the end
